assignments.title: 割り当て
assignments.empty_hint: 作成 a goal and decompose it into steps. The orchestrator runs them through your チーム in parallel.
assignments.goal_placeholder: What should the チーム accomplish?
assignments.step_description_placeholder: What does this step need to do?
assignments.error_step_incomplete: Every step needs a title and an assigned ペルソナ.
assignments.error_step_persona_required: Manual matching requires a ペルソナ for every step.
assignments.strategy_manual_hint: You pick the ペルソナ for each step at creation time.
assignments.strategy_embedding_hint: Each step's ペルソナ is resolved at run time via local fastembed cosine. Cheap; needs the ml build.
assignments.strategy_llm_eval_hint: Sonnet picks the best ペルソナ per step. One call per step; uses your Anthropic subscription.
assignments.auto_decompose_hint: Let Sonnet propose 2-6 steps for this goal. You can edit before submitting.
assignments.decompose_empty: Sonnet returned no steps — try a more specific goal.
assignments.review_hint: Adjust the requirement or pick a different チーム member, then re-run this step.
assignments.notification_failed_summary: Step "{step}" failed. Click to review and adjust.
assignments.notification_unmatched_summary: Step "{step}" has no eligible ペルソナ. Click to review.
assignments.save_template_hint: Save this title, goal, strategy and steps as a reusable template for this チーム.

team_studio.disband_title: Disband チーム (keeps ペルソナs)
team_studio.add_persona_none: Every ペルソナ is already on this チーム.
team_studio.orchestrate_subtitle: Describe the goal — the orchestrator routes it to the right ペルソナs.
team_studio.orchestrate_placeholder: e.g. Pull this week's customer feedback, triage the top themes, and draft a backlog summary.
team_studio.assignment_dispatched: Assignment dispatched — the orchestrator is routing steps to members now.
team_studio.no_routing: routing produced — try a more specific goal.
team_studio.no_capabilities_persona: This ペルソナ has no capabilities defined.
team_studio.select_member: 選択 a member to adjust its capabilities.
team_studio.empty_roster: This チーム has no ペルソナs yet. Add members to build its roster.
team_studio.workspace_hint: Shared instructions and defaults applied to every member of this チーム.
team_studio.shared_instructions_placeholder: Guidance appended to every チーム member's prompt — e.g. cite codebase evidence, prefer empirical over speculative judgments.
team_studio.add_persona_draft_hint: 下書きペルソナは、チームに参加する前に昇格する必要があります。
team_studio.checklist_background_note: バックグラウンドで実行中
team_studio.board_empty: 割り当てはまだありません。開始するには Orchestrate で目標を定義してください。
